target: Wh-What's wrong? You look like you're not feeling well...
(Right, Koyuba-san called out to me, and we were going to exchange contact info...)
(And then... we registered them. With each other...)
(Anyway, Koyuba-san is still alive... That's the biggest relief.)
(But at this rate, I'll just repeat the same past all over again.)
(Calm down, look at the big picture. I need to think about what I should do from now on.)
Koyuba-san. Where are you planning to stay while on the island?
Huh? An inn on the island, but...?
Which inn is it!? Tell me!

W-wait a second!
Why the sudden question?
Umm, it's just a normal inn, you know? Look, the <color=#GF_TIPS_041>brochure</color>. The people at the town hall prepared it for me...

(The town hall? Why would they…
Anyway, that's not important…)
Listen carefully, Koyuba-san. You absolutely must not go out at night!
Th-That's because... apparently there's a suspicious person wandering around the island right now.

Yeah, it'll be too late if something happens.
So it's better not to go out.

O-okay, I get it.
I'll be careful.
(I don't know if she really believes me, but with this, she should be okay for tonight...)
It's been a while since I came back to the island, so I was anxious about a lot of things.
So I was really happy that Ajiro-kun worried about me... I feel relieved.

A suspicious person… That's scary.
Yeah, I won't go out at night.
(Thank goodness... This looks like it'll work out.)
But don't worry too much, okay?
If push comes to shove, this will protect me, so I'll be fine!
Do you remember, Ajiro-kun? Look, it's a <color=#GF_KEY_KEYHOLDER>keychain</color> of the character I've liked since I was little!

Ah, I haven't seen it in a while!
You still have it?
But, what do you mean by 'it will protect you'--
Welcome back, Shin-chan!! Good work on the long triiiiiiip!?
(Come to think of it, back then... I felt like I heard Ushio's voice.)
(If that was Ushio's wish, then what I need to do right now is--)

Mio! Leave it to me!
I'll stop the bike!
(Did they jump into the sea... to save me?)
Both of you, I'm sorry. Because of me...
No, I'm just glad you're safe.
(I meant to save her, but ended up being saved...)
(This is no good! If things stay like this...)
